---
title: "Georgia"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
  # dev = "ragg_png"
)

# load packages
library(shiny)
library(highcharter)
library(dplyr)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(dplyr)
library(htmltools)

# load data
source("prep/00_library.R")
source("prep/dataframes.R")
```

<br>

```{r results = "asis"}
data(penguins, package = "palmerpenguins")

hchart(penguins, "scatter", hcaes(x = body_mass_g, y = flipper_length_mm, group = species)) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Penguin Body Mass vs. Flipper Length") %>%
  hc_xAxis(title = list(text = "Body Mass (g)")) %>%
  hc_yAxis(title = list(text = "Flipper Length (mm)")) %>%
  htmltools::browsable()
```

```{r}
# panels for different sections
tabsetPanel(
  id = "tabsetpanel",
  tabPanel("Overview",
    "TBD",
  ),
  tabPanel("Parole Eligibility",
    "TBD"
  ),
  tabPanel("Releases from Prison",
    "TBD."
  ),
  tabPanel("Sentencing",
    "TBD."
  ),
  tabPanel("Disparities",
    "TBD."
  ),
)
```
